description_long: This vase features a modern, minimalist design with a smooth, gently tapering cylindrical body. The upper portion is finished in a matte light gray, while the lower section is accented with a glossy, golden-yellow band that wraps around the base. The transition between the two colors is clean and even, giving the vase a contemporary and elegant appearance. The surface appears hard and smooth, likely made from ceramic or porcelain with a metallic or painted lower accent. The opening at the top is wide enough to accommodate medium-sized floral arrangements or decorative branches. Its simple yet striking color contrast makes it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A modern, smooth vase with a matte gray body and a glossy golden-yellow base accent, featuring a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vase's full tapering shape with the golden-yellow band clearly visible at the base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, the vase maintains its smooth profile and the golden accent remains prominent around the bottom.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to the previous, with the color transition and glossy base still clearly defined.
description_view_3: Back view, showing the continuous golden band and the consistent matte gray finish on the upper body.
